spec.name: A
spec.query:
WITH __temporal_aggregation_cte AS (
 SELECT 
 fingerprint, 
 toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(intDiv(unix_milli, 1000)), toIntervalSecond(60)) AS ts, 
 avg(value) AS per_series_value 
 FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 AS points 
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT fingerprint 
 FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 
 WHERE metric_name IN ('latency_anomaly_baseline_deviation') 
 AND LOWER(temporality) LIKE LOWER('cumulative') 
 AND __normalized = false 
 GROUP BY fingerprint
 ) AS filtered_time_series ON points.fingerprint = filtered_time_series.fingerprint 
 WHERE metric_name IN ('latency_anomaly_baseline_deviation') 
 AND unix_milli >= $start_timestamp_ms 
 AND unix_milli < $end_timestamp_ms 
 GROUP BY fingerprint, ts 
 ORDER BY fingerprint, ts
), 
__spatial_aggregation_cte AS (
 SELECT 
 ts, 
 sum(per_series_value) AS value 
 FROM __temporal_aggregation_cte 
 WHERE isNaN(per_series_value) = 0 
 GROUP BY ts
) 
SELECT * FROM __spatial_aggregation_cte 
ORDER BY ts

annotations.description: Anomaly: latest value is {{$value}} standard deviations from the baseline (warning threshold {{$threshold}}σ)
annotations.summary: Series deviated from its statistical baseline
